mdSummary:
# Grid

CSS grid wrapper with columns + gap as props.

**Package:** `Lumeo` · **Category:** Layout
**Docs:** https://lumeo.nativ.sh/components/grid

## Parameters
| Owner | Name | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Grid | Columns | `int` | `1` |  |
| Grid | Gap | `string?` | `"4"` |  |
| Grid | RowGap | `string?` | `` |  |
| Grid | ColGap | `string?` | `` |  |
| Grid | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| Grid | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| Grid | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |

## Slots
- `ChildContent` (Grid) — RenderFragment slot

## Events
- (none)

## Sub-components
- (none)

## Cascading values it expects
- (none)

## Services it injects
- (none)

## Keyboard
—

## Example
```razor
<Grid />
```

## CSS variables
`--color-foreground`

## Files
- `UI/Grid/Grid.razor`
